word: G1997 - ἐπισυναγωγή - episynagōgḗ - ep-ee-soon-ag-o-gay' - Assembling together

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
a gathering together in one place
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1996; a complete collection; specifically a Christian meeting (for worship): - assembling (gathering) together.
